ddls:
CREATE TABLE "films" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film */,
  "original_title" TEXT /* Original title of the film */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the director of the film */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the film */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the film was released */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the film in minutes */,
  "has_homepage" INTEGER /* Indicates if the film has a dedicated homepage */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the film */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline of the film */,
  "overview" TEXT /* Brief overview of the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Full name of the director */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the director */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the director */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "casts" (
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast member entry */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the film in which the actor appeared */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the actor */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of appearance in the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_casts_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production company entry */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the film produced by the company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "origin_country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the production company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_companies_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre entry */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the film associated with the genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genres_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword entry */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the film associated with the keyword */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* The keyword itself */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_keywords_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial entry */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the film for which the financials apply */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the film */,
  "budget_adj" REAL /* Adjusted budget for inflation */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the film */,
  "revenue_adj" REAL /* Adjusted revenue for inflation */,
  "opening_weekend" REAL /* Opening weekend revenue */,
  "opening_weekend_adj" REAL /* Adjusted opening weekend revenue for inflation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financials_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote entry */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the film being voted on */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Total number of votes received by the film */,
  "vote_average" REAL /* Average rating based on votes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "popularity" (
  "popularity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each popularity entry */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the film associated with the popularity score */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* Score indicating the popularity of the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("popularity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_popularity_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., producer, analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review entry */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the film being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media" (
  "social_media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media entry */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the film associated with the social media metrics */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform (e.g., Twitter, Facebook) */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers on the platform */,
  "engagement" REAL /* Engagement rate on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award entry */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the film that received the award or nomination */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the award */,
  "won" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the film won the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the film associated with the demographic data */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)
